voiceClonePolicy.fallback: Coutis records his lines on-camera; non-Coutis narration uses Sarah (EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL) placeholder until association narrator selected

tagline: The peak body that runs jobs.

scenes.voiceover: Six suppliers, one job. You already pay them all.

data.framing: chest-up, conversational eye level, charcoal backdrop

scenes.voiceover: Australian restoration firms pay six suppliers to do the work of one peak body. Cert. Leads. Marketing. Software. Insurance. Equipment.
scenes.onScreenText:
Six invoices.
Six counter-parties.
Six points of failure.

scenes.voiceover: The expanded NRPG association bundles every one of those suppliers into one membership. Member-as-a-Service. Cert held to international benchmark. Jobs routed to certified firms. Marketing run for the trade, not by the trade.

Founded by three people. Phill McGurk, Unite-Group. Toby Bredhauer, Carpet Cleaners Warehouse, national equipment distribution. John Coutis OAM, Order of Australia Medal recipient, twenty-five-year keynote speaker, audience of six million worldwide.

Founder tier opens today. One hundred places. Two hundred and forty-nine dollars per month. Locked at that rate for life. The cap is small so the founding cohort actually steers year-one decisions. Link in the description.
One body. One membership. One hundred founder places. If you run a crew in this country, this was built for you. Link below.

data.framing: chest-up, conversational eye level, charcoal backdrop, final beat of held silence before cut
data.pullQuote: Built for the people who run the jobs.

scenes.onScreenText: The peak body that runs jobs.
